code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut x = n / 10
  while x > 0
    result = "#{result}X"
    x = x - 1
  end
  let u = n % 10
  match u
  when 0
    result
  when 1
    "#{result}I"
  when 2
    "#{result}II"
  when 3
    "#{result}III"
  when 4
    "#{result}IV"
  when 5
    "#{result}V"
  when 6
    "#{result}VI"
  when 7
    "#{result}VII"
  when 8
    "#{result}VIII"
  when 9
    "#{result}IX"
  when _
    result
  end
end

print(to_roman(4))
print(to_roman(9))
print(to_roman(27))
print(to_roman(39))
